review_title: Uncover the Most Popular Questions and Ideas with AnswerThePublic
description: AnswerThePublic can be a valuable tool for content creators, marketers, and SEO professionals who are looking for insights and ideas for content creation based on what people are searching for online. It provides a simple and visually appealing way to explore the most common questions, phrases, and related search queries related to a particular topic or keyword.However, as with any tool, there are some limitations to consider, such as the potential for limited data and accuracy, as well as the lack of customization.
author: Manish Singh B.
pros: AnswerThePublic is the best tool that can be useful for content creators to gather insights and ideas for content creation based on what people are searching for online. It generates a list of questions people are searching for on a particular topic.The tool presents the data in a visually appealing way, which can make it easier for users to understand and interpret.Instead of manually researching and analyzing the most popular questions on a particular topic, AnswerThePublic automates the process and provides users with a comprehensive list of questions and ideas.It can help content creators come up with fresh and unique ideas for blog posts, videos, and other types of content that are based on what people are searching for online.
cons: The free version of AnswerThePublic limits the number of search queries that can be performed daily and provides a limited number of results per query, which may not be enough.The tool relies on data from Google's autocomplete feature, which is not always reliable or accurate, and may not always provide the most relevant or useful results.AnswerThePublic does not allow users to customize their search queries or filters to obtain more specific results, which may limit its usefulness for some users.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Ideale per un rapido riscontro sulle keywords di ricerca online
description: Positiva, lo utilizzo molto spesso per monitorare le ricerche online degli utenti.
author: Luca T.
pros: Intuitivo, facile da utilizzare e output di dati graficamente molto gradevoli.
cons: Per il momento non ho riscontrato nessun inconveniente degno di nota,

review_title: The perfect tools for filling in content gaps
description: Overall, AnswerThePublic has helped me think more outside of the box as a content strategist, considering every facet of a topic. It's giving me more content creation ideas that I can use to help our clients grow their online presence while providing useful, quality content to their audiences.
author: Lauren V.
pros: I love that AnswerThePublic allows you to consider every single way in which someone might search for your target topic online. I use it alongside tools like Semrush and the "people also asked" on Google to ensure I'm covering a topic entirely and filling in gaps that competitors haven't covered. I also really appreciate the comparison section where you can see common comparisons to your topic and similar topics people search.
cons: It would be nice to have an option for viewing search volume along with keywords and phrases, making it easier to prioritize content planning for robust topics.

description: AnswerThePublic was and is still my go-to source whenever I need to get writing about a specific topic or niche. It helps me to get my ideas flowing and does so for free. The best thing is that it also form the right questions that your audience is asking, so you don't need to make things up that could eventually hurt your research.
author: Coën V.
pros: - gives you up to date search / question queries - answers your own questions about customer behavior / pain points - nice structured and clustered for quick search - gives actionable steps on what to write / publish about next - high value even for free users - a lot of relevant data
cons: I have yet to find something negative. So no.

review_title: Herramienta imprescindible para marketing de contenidos.
description: En general es una herramienta que uso y he recomendado a muchos compañeros y clientes.
author: Alex M.
pros: Me gusta la clasificación de las palabras clave, especialmente las long tail.
cons: Quizás el precio no es accesible para todos los públicos.

review_title: Great tool if you have a proper budget
author: Marco C.
pros: It's straightforward to use and gives you a ton of insights. Even a non-technical person can start to use it in a matter of minutes.
cons: It doesn't give you actionable advice. It gives you a ton of insights, but if you are not into the SEO game, even if you'll be able to use the tool, you don't gain the actual value from it. Generally speaking, it's not expensive, but it can't work as a comprehensive SEO suite, so you need to allocate an extra budget to it. It's worth only If you produce a ton of contents daily/weekly; otherwise, the free plan is more than enough.

review_title: One of the most valuable tool for any kind of content creators
author: Esther M.
pros: AnswerThePublic is a great tool that can be beneficial to any blogger, YouTuber, podcaster or any other sort of creator to help create meaningful content for their audience. As a content creator, sometimes, I can miss the mark making contents that my audience will find valuable. AnswerThePublic gives you great ideas and suggestion based on one to two keywords. They never disappoint.
cons: The only con is that they can be a little pricey for the average Joe. Especially, for the new content creators, money can be tight. Maybe a trial version with full functionality might bring higher conversion rate.
author_profession: Product Designer / Multimedia Artist / Graphic Designer

review_title: Essential for researches and content prodution
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's ridiculously easy to use. Just search for the terms you want and you're done: hundreds of pre-made Google queries already appear, giving valuable insights.
cons: There is only one tool and that's all. If you are looking for more robust tasks, there are other tools in the market (they are far expensive, but can do the same job)

review_title: Highly useful tool for content writers
author: Chandan S.
pros: Helps in finding unlimited ideas to create/write content on any topic based on target audience. Visual presentation looks beautiful and is enticing for in-depth keyword research. Helps in understanding the user search intent by providing question based keywords.
cons: Only con I find is their pricing at the moment. Free version provides very limited number of searched per day.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Ideal for Finding Google Long Tail Queries
author: Khushbu P.
pros: The tool eases the keyword research process by allowing you to find the google autocompletes for keywords. It can be useful for finding the questions and long tail queries.
cons: The daily limitations of 3 searches per user can be a negative point.
